_why_separated: Google Drive MCP is currently brokered via mcp.composio.dev (third-party). Sample OAuth tokens transit Composio infrastructure. Re-evaluate when Anthropic-native GDrive MCP ships.
_how_to_enable: After security team approval: copy the entry under `mcpServers.google-drive` into .mcp.json, restart Claude Code, run `/mcp google-drive` to OAuth.

google-drive._note: third-party broker (composio.dev) — OAuth tokens transit Composio infra
